raw.message: Nottingham you’ve got a fresh new restaurant! Come on down we've got all your favourites and more!

hook.summary: Sequential text reveal announcing a new location in Nottingham.
hook.visual_action: Text blocks 'NOTTINGHAM' and 'YOU'VE GOT A FRESH' appear on a cream background.

scene_flow: Text 'NOTTINGHAM' appears at the top of the frame.
Green banner with 'YOU'VE GOT A FRESH' slides in below the header.
Burger King logo and 'new restaurant' text appear in the center.
A large Whopper burger slides in from the right side over an orange background.
Final location details and address are displayed at the bottom.
on_screen_text: Now open at Lady Bay Retail Park, Meadow Lane, NG2 3GZ
cta_text: Now open at Lady Bay Retail Park, Meadow Lane, NG2 3GZ
audience_proxy: Local residents in Nottingham, UK, interested in fast food and new dining locations.
